findings.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
findings.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

findings.description: ESD protection audit for generic connector J1: partial coverage.

findings.summary: Single-pin net: U4.VREG_LX only connects to U4.48 (VREG_LX) (power_out)
findings.description: Net '__unnamed_37' has exactly one pin: U4.48 (VREG_LX), pin_type='power_out'. Verify the intended target — if this pin should connect somewhere, the wire/label is missing.
findings.recommendation: Check the schematic at the referenced pin — add the missing wire or place a no-connect marker if the pin is intentionally floating.

report_context.impact: Power source with no declared load — acceptable if loads are on another sheet, otherwise suspicious.

report_context.impact: Likely unfinished wiring: a driven or powered pin has no counterpart.

report_context.impact: Passive or unclassified pin lonely on its own net.

findings.description: Net +5V carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/14 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 14 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.
